entities.name: SEASONAL CLIMATE FORECASTS
entities.description: Forecasts of seasonal climate patterns intended to assist in farm decision making

entities.name: STATISTICAL METHODS OF ANALYSIS
entities.description: Simple statistical techniques used to characterize long-term rainfall data

entities.name: LONG TERM RAINFALL
entities.description: Historical rainfall records used to estimate climate risk and perform weather-within-climate analyses

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK
entities.description: The potential for negative impacts on agriculture due to climate patterns

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The semi-arid location where the rainfall data was characterized

entities.name: WEATHER-WITHIN-CLIMATE ANALYSES
entities.description: Tailored analyses using daily rainfall records to meet farmers' needs

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural systems relying on rainfall, sensitive to season length and dry spells

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period of rainfall, defined by its start, end, and length

entities.name: DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Periods of rainfall deficiency that pose risks to rainfed agriculture

entities.name: RAINFALL DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The temporal arrangement of rainfall amounts throughout the year

entities.name: EL NINO
entities.description: A climate phenomenon affecting the frequency and length of dry spells and rainfall totals

entities.name: LA NINA
entities.description: A climate phenomenon used as a comparison for rainfall patterns and dry spell risks

entities.name: ORDINARY SEASON
entities.description: A baseline climate season used for comparison with El Nino and La Nina

entities.name: RAINFALL ONSET AND CESSATION DATES
entities.description: The specific dates marking the beginning and end of the rainy season

entities.name: TOTAL RAINFALL AMOUNT
entities.description: The overall quantity of precipitation recorded

entities.name: HISTORIC CLIMATE DATA
entities.description: Past climate records used to enhance the value of seasonal forecasts

entities.name: SHORTER RANGE FORECASTS
entities.description: Short-term weather predictions used alongside seasonal forecasts

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A target for technological research to help farmers cope with climate variability

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Short-term fluctuations in climate that farmers must cope with

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in climate patterns requiring adaptive strategies
